title: Durability Overlay Netherite
description:
Shows Armor durability by changing its color.

Has 11 different durability colors
body:
Show Netherite armor durability by changing its color.

This pack has 11 different color for armor according to its durability.

From 100% - 20% Armor durability color changes on every 10% Damage,

then from 20% Armor durability its color changes on every 5% Damage.

**This Pack Needs Optifine; Use [CitResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for older versions, [Variants-Cit](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) for latest minecraft versions for Fabric Mod**.![This Pack Illustrates the Armor Durability By Changing its colour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dfb6b42f0d6ea06faf9b71b291b16ef82a588c5.png)
